package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/json"
)

// scenario for json_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: The same local JSON payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: mod; severity: contextual.
type Rule432PositiveRecordFirst struct { Name string }
type Rule432PositiveRecordSecond struct { Count int }

func scenario432Positive(payload []byte) error {
	var first Rule432PositiveRecordFirst
	if err := json.Unmarshal(payload, &first); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	var second Rule432PositiveRecordSecond
	return json.Unmarshal(payload, &second)
}
